Tools

Some fun calculators I made.

Landing Burn Calculator

Calculates throttle required to land.

Landing Burn Calculator (Alpha)

First released version of the landing burn calculator

Rendezvous Phase Angle Calculator

Calculates phase angle for a targeted Hohmann transfer
